markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.620 — Coordination with Metropolitan Planning Organizations to Develop Long-term Planning Assumptions

The department shall collaborate with metropolitan planning organizations to develop mutually acceptable assumptions for the purposes of long-range federal and state funding forecasts and use those assumptions to guide long-term planning in the statewide transportation plan under Section 201.601 (Statewide Transportation Plan) .

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 19, eff. September 1, 2011.*
